What best describes you?

Housing Society

Simplify charging for residents. Automate billing and monitor with ease.
OR

Developer / Commercial

Unlock new revenue streams and build future-ready infrastructure.

just want to explore about us then scroll down

Our Positioning

We help properties become EV-ready.

We are not a charger hardware vendor. EBEECHARGE is an enabler and facilitator in the emobility ecosystem. We coordinate the full lifecycle of property electrification so you can focus on your residents and tenants.

The Complete EBEE Infrastructure Lifecycle

From initial site assessment to continuous revenue payouts, we handle the technical complexity end-to-end.

01

Planning

Grid analysis, localized load capacity mapping, and custom layout drawings prepared by expert electrical engineers.

02

Infrastructure

Smart distribution panel backbones that integrate seamlessly with your building's existing transformer feeds.

03

Deployment

Safety-verified physical installation, load checks, protective grounding, and localized network activation.

04

Management

Granular access controls, dynamic pricing schedules, and resident/valet priority queuing management options.

05

Monitoring

24/7 cloud sync reporting diagnostic alerts, kW load cycles, and live session health audits automatically.

06

Revenue Enablement

Integrated UPI, cards, and mobile wallets payment collections with automated developer split payouts.

07

Scalability

An expandable architecture that lets you scale from 2 to 50+ bays seamlessly without expensive power upgrades.

✓

Outcome

A fully automated, grid-safe EV property requiring zero daily management overhead.

The Ecosystem Concept

Three Layers. One Unified Platform.

Our products are not isolated charging devices. They are integrated layers of a single property operating system that coordinates power, hardware mobility, and billing intelligence.

Layer 01

Smart DB

The Foundation

The grid-aware backbone. Installed directly inside the electrical room, the Smart DB manages power dynamic allocations, protecting properties from expensive transformer upgrades and main breaker trips during peak hours.

Explore the Foundation Layer →
Layer 02

Movable Charger

The Flexibility Layer

Wheeled charging nodes. Eliminate stationary bottlenecks and slot hogging. Movable Chargers slide between parking spaces dynamically, tripling daily charging capacity and reducing copper cable runs.

Explore the Flexibility Layer →
Layer 03

EBEE Dashboard

The Intelligence Layer

The central console. Manages resident utility splits, sets commercial dynamic tariffs, monitors localized grid health, and triggers automated revenue payouts from a single login.

Explore the Intelligence Layer →
Property Solutions

Tailored Around Your Property.

We design custom EV deployment plans for different property typologies to yield the best functional outcome.

For RWAs

Housing Societies

Frictionless charging logs, automated resident slab billing splits, and safety balancing controls.
For Corporate Landlords

Commercial Properties

Electrify office parks, tech hubs, and corporate assets to attract high-value tenants and support fleets.
For Builders & Malls

Developers

Unlock monetization from unused parking spaces, manage yields, and model returns with our ROI engine.
For Cities & Municipalities

Public Infrastructure

Robust outdoor panels, municipal fleet depots, and public transit highway hubs built for high-throughput.

Smart Nodes Managed

"Managing EV charging was a major RWA hurdle. Settle billing disputes, parse slab splits, verify safety. EBEECHARGE deployed their panels and software, taking over the complete administration. Zero disputes since."

K. P. Rao

RWA President, Skyheights Society

"Rather than blocking premium slots with stationary chargers, we deployed the EBEE Movable Charger. Our valet staff moves units sequence-wise between vehicles. We tripled charging yield sessions on the same power budget."

N. Murthy

VP Operations, Nexus Commercial Developers

End-to-end, intelligent charging ecosystem designed around your residential and commercial properties.
